description: Build www/ assets and commit with git add -f after all fixes are applied
steps: Step 1 - Create branch fix-all-issues from main: git checkout -b fix-all-issues
Step 2 - Install shared deps: cd panel/web/shared && npm install
Step 3 - Build admin: cd panel/web/admin && npm install && npm run build
Step 4 - Build portal: cd panel/web/portal && npm install && npm run build
Step 5 - Verify Go builds: go build ./...
Step 6 - Stage and commit: git add -f panel/web/admin/www panel/web/portal/www && git add -A && git commit
acceptance_criteria: panel/web/admin/www/ directory exists with built assets
panel/web/portal/www/ directory exists with built assets
All changes committed on fix-all-issues branch
verification: git status shows clean working tree
